page_header.label: USE CASES
page_header.title: Real-World Applications
page_header.description: See how teams and individuals use ZKIRA for confidential payments.

items.title: Freelancers
items.description: Invoice clients without exposing your wallet
items.quote: Every invoice I send shows my balance to clients. With ZKIRA, I can negotiate with confidence.

items.title: Payroll
items.quote: Our entire team could see everyone else's salary on-chain. ZKIRA solved that immediately.

items.title: Merchants
items.description: Accept payments without sharing your business wallet
items.quote: Our competitors could see exactly how much revenue we made. Now they can't.

items.title: DAO Treasury
items.quote: Competitors could analyze our spending patterns and runway. ZKIRA changed that.

items.title: Personal
items.description: Send money to friends and family privately
items.quote: I sent my sister money for rent. She could see my entire wallet balance. Never again.
